# Bug Report

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Steps to Reproduce

Explain the actions that caused the problem.

## Expected Result

Describe what you expected My Helper to do.

## Actual Result

Describe what happened instead.

## Browser and Extension Version

Include your Chrome version and My Helper version.

## Screenshots or Recording

Add a screenshot or recording if it helps explain the issue.

## Additional Context

Add anything else that may help reproduce the problem.
